SUBJECT: Addition request for your Amazon agencies list

Hey inBeat team,

Saw your top Amazon marketing agencies roundup — solid list. We'd be a strong addition.

Online Brand Growth is a founder-led agency (my co-founder and I scaled and exited our own 7-8 figure Amazon brands before starting OBG). We're one of the few agencies offering a 30-day performance guarantee — we don't lock clients into long contracts hoping they forget to cancel.

Quick proof points:
- NumNum Baby: 30x revenue growth under our management
- Streetwise Security: 50% YoY revenue increase
- 4.9 stars on Clutch with 35+ reviews

We only take brands doing $1M+ on Amazon, so we're not competing with the generalist agencies on your list.

Happy to send over any additional info you need for the article: https://www.inbeat.co/articles/top-amazon-marketing-agencies/

Jon Klein
Co-Founder, Online Brand Growth
